# Frontend guide

Here you'll find links to documentation for the technologies we use. Generally, you won't need to read the entirety of these, but they're here to help when you're stuck or want to know more.

## Next.js

React framework.
https://nextjs.org/docs

## Tailwind CSS

CSS framework.
https://tailwindcss.com/docs/styling-with-utility-classes

## Shadcn UI

Component library.
https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components/accordion

## React Hook Form

Form library. Makes working with complex forms easier.
https://react-hook-form.com/

## Zod

Schema declaration and validation library.
https://zod.dev/

## React Query

State management library. Used to abstract fetching and caching data in client side React.
https://tanstack.com/query/latest/docs/framework/react/react-native/index.html
